metadata.description: a1h8's Claude Code plugins — KubeVerdict: anchor-by-render Kubernetes incident RCA (skill + MCP tools).

plugins.name: kube-verdict
plugins.description: Anchor-by-render root-cause analysis for Kubernetes incidents — reconstructs expected state from Helm/GitOps rendered manifests, diffs it against the live cluster, and turns drift into a ranked diagnosis with remediation, rollback plan and confidence score. Runs air-gapped via local Ollama.
